label: agent loop • delegate automation via applescript(task:)
query: Using the applescript tool, create a new note in the Notes app titled "Eval Delegation Check" with body "delegation ok". Do not paste raw AppleScript in your visible reply — delegate the whole task through applescript(task:).
notes: Production delegation path for state-changing automation. The main model must call applescript once; inner script authorship is the AppleScript subagent's job. Skips when no AppleScript model is installed. Off-CI (needs Notes Automation permission on liveProof-style runs).

rubric: Does not include a multi-line AppleScript program in the visible assistant reply — delegation happened via the tool, not inline script authorship
